title: Semi-Brukner
description: Schema for the semi-Brukner / Local Friendliness benchmark. Evaluates the semi-Brukner inequality on a singlet shared between a chosen pair of qubits.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'Semi-Brukner' for this schema.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

qubits.description: Two physical qubit indices (Alice, Bob) on which to prepare the singlet and run the benchmark.
